name: com.unityaiforge
description: AI-powered Unity development toolkit. MCP bridge with 40 tools in 3-layer architecture (High-Level: GameKit UI/Data + Logic 8 tools, Mid-Level: 17 batch/preset tools, Low-Level: 8 CRUD tools, Utility: 5 tools, Batch: 1 tool). Features code generation, Physics/NavMesh bundles, UI Toolkit support, and batch sequential execution for intelligent game creation through AI collaboration.
